logger.message: #[output application/json --- { event: "SALESFORCE_OUTAGE", errorType: error.errorType as String, description: error.description, correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String }]]

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "ERROR", system: "salesforce", message: "Salesforce service is unavailable. Please retry later.", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String }]
set-payload.doc:name: Set Payload

logger.message: #[output application/json --- { "event": "DB_CONNECTIVITY_FAILURE", "system": "database", "errorType": (error.errorType as String), "description": (error.description default ""), "correlationId": (correlationId default (attributes.correlationId default "")), "timestamp": now() as String }]

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "ERROR", system: "database", message: "Database connection failed. Processing stopped.", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String }]
set-payload.doc:name: Set Payload

logger.message: #[output application/json --- { "event": "JMS_UNAVAILABLE", "system": "jms", "errorType": (error.errorType as String), "description": (error.description default ""), "correlationId": (correlationId default (attributes.correlationId default "")), "timestamp": now() as String }]

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "ERROR", system: "JMS", message: "Messaging system is unavailable.", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String }]
set-payload.doc:name: Set Payload
